query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN title LIKE '%alagoas%' OR title LIKE '%maceió%' OR title LIKE '%arapiraca%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as alagoas_mentions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title LIKE '%são paulo%' OR title LIKE '%paulista%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sp_mentions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title LIKE '%rio de janeiro%' OR title LIKE '%carioca%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rj_mentions,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM articles;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AGjn9SpCJUmEG7Z.root --database 6wzLmWaAhQKjEBEoadSqJc --execute SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN title LIKE '%alagoas%' OR title LIKE '%maceió%' OR title LIKE '%arapiraca%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as alagoas_mentions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title LIKE '%são paulo%' OR title LIKE '%paulista%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sp_mentions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title LIKE '%rio de janeiro%' OR title LIKE '%carioca%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rj_mentions,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM articles;
